title: 70 judges in Lucknow cycle to court amid PM Modi's push to save fuel
description: Approximately 70 judges in Lucknow cycled to work on Friday morning in response to Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s appeal to conserve fuel amid the ongoing global energy crisis due to the US-Iran war.According to PTI, the group of judicial officers was flagged off by Justice Rajesh Singh Chauhan of the Allahabad High Court, who led the initiative and joined the symbolic ride. Lawyers and court staff also participated in the bicycle ride, with several opting e-rickshaws to commute to court premise
